name: rosavin
mechanism: Proposed mechanism based on preclinical and limited human data: rosavin is a characteristic Rhodiola rosea marker compound associated with adaptogenic and monoamine/stress-response effects in standardized extracts.
contraindications: Potential additive effects with stimulants or serotonergic agents remain theoretical.
summary: Proposed mechanism based on preclinical and limited human data: rosavin is a characteristic Rhodiola rosea marker compound associated with adaptogenic and monoamine/stress-response effects in standardized extracts.
